heading: Moonies Hill vs Moonyoonooka — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moonies Hill, Western Australia and Moonyoonooka, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moonyoonooka has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Moonies Hill (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moonies Hill or Moonyoonooka safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moonies Hill has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Moonyoonooka scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moonies Hill scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Moonyoonooka scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moonies Hill or Moonyoonooka?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moonyoonooka has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
